cleavage agent: digested using sequencing grade modified trypsin/Lys-C
collision energy: HCD was performed at a normalized collision energy of 28%
fragmentation method: Higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) was performed
instrument: All mass spectrometry experiments were performed on a Q Exactive Plus
ionization type: eluted via a heated electrospray ionization (HESI) source
labeling: Peptides were separated using online RP-LC
